holdings.name: VANGUARD EMERGING MARKETS STOCK INDEX FUND-SWAP-CLST-L

raw.n: VANGUARD EMERGING MARKETS STOCK INDEX FUND-SWAP-CLST-L

summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Corgi Emerging Markets 2x Daily ETF (EMXX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of the Vanguard FTSE Emerging Markets ETF (NYSE Arca: VWO), which provides a market cap-weighted exposure to the emerging markets equity space. EMXX was launched on Jun 3, 2026 and is issued by L&G.
